channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us

item.title: This could have been a year of a federal court reckoning for Trump. Judges had other ideas
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — The indictment charging Donald Trump with hoarding classified documents leveled one jaw-dropping allegation after another, including that he showed off a secret Pentagon attack plan to guests at his golf club and suggested his lawyer mislead the FBI about the presence of the White
item.dc:creator: ERIC TUCKER and ALANNA DURKIN RICHER, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Dodgers tie postseason mark of 33 straight scoreless innings, top Mets 9-0 in NLCS opener
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — After spending the first seven years of his big league career back East, Jack Flaherty came home. He joined a winning team in the Los Angeles Dodgers and helped make a bit of playoff history.
item.dc:creator: BETH HARRIS, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Republican lawsuits target rules for overseas voters, but those ballots are already sent
item.description: ATLANTA (AP) — The latest method of voting to fall into the political crosshairs is the way overseas voters — including members of the military stationed abroad — cast their ballots. The process is governed by federal law and implemented by states.
item.dc:creator: CHRISTINA A. CASSIDY and NICHOLAS RICCARDI, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Middle East latest: US says it will send THAAD defense battery to Israel, along with US troops
item.description: The U.S. is sending a Terminal High Altitude Area Defense battery to Israel, along with US troops to operate it. The Pentagon made the announcement just hours after Iran warned the U.S. to keep its military forces out of Israel.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Trump tested the limits on using the military at home. If elected again, he plans to go further
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — During his first term as president, Donald Trump tested the limits of how he could use the military to achieve policy goals. If given a second term, the Republican and his allies are preparing to go much further, reimagining the military as an all-powerful tool to deploy on U.S.
item.dc:creator: STEPHEN GROVES, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Man arrested outside Trump Coachella rally denies assassination intent; he's 'all in' supporting Trump
item.description: The suspect who was arrested after authorities apprehended him on his way into the Coachella rally for former President Donald Trump is setting the record straight and working to clear his name.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Trump calls for adding 10,000 Border Patrol agents after derailing a bipartisan border bill
item.description: PRESCOTT VALLEY, Ariz. (AP) — Former President Donald Trump on Sunday proposed hiring 10,000 additional Border Patrol agents and giving them a $10,000 retention and signing bonus, after he derailed a bipartisan bill earlier this year that included funding for more border personnel.
item.dc:creator: MEG KINNARD and NICHOLAS RICCARDI, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: What $35 trillion in US national debt means for Americans
item.description: With the national debt standing at more than $35 trillion, economists fear that the country's debt load will only grow.
item.dc:creator: Jeff Arnold, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Democratic voter registration raises red flags for Harris
item.description: Democrats’ voter registration advantage has dropped in three key battleground states — Pennsylvania, North Carolina and Nevada — raising a red flag for Vice President Harris as experts cite a lack of enthusiasm for the Biden administration brand and the Democratic Party, generally, as problems.
item.dc:creator: Alexander Bolton, NewsNation

item.title: Sam's Club opening location in Texas, but there's no checkout lanes
item.description: Sam's Club CEO Chris Nicholas says the warehouse club chain will soon open a store in Texas but there won't be any checkout lanes.
item.dc:creator: Kyler Swaim, KREX 5

item.title: Nearly 200 miles of Blue Ridge Parkway reopens as long-term work remains in North Carolina
item.description: The Blue Ridge Parkway was closed indefinitely after Hurricane Helene swept through the region last month.
item.dc:creator: QCN Digital Staff, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Cops nab man allegedly carrying illegal guns near Trump's Coachella rally; suspect says he backs ex-president
item.description: Authorities arrested a man outside former President Donald Trump's Coachella Valley campaign rally on Saturday in possession of a shotgun, a loaded handgun, and a high-capacity magazine.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Riverside Co. Sheriff says deputies 'probably' prevented third assassination attempt on Trump
item.description: A man was arrested outside of a campaign rally for former President Donald Trump in Southern California, and multiple guns were illegally in his possession, according to authorities. The arrest took place at a checkpoint at the intersection of Avenue 52 and Celebration Drive in Coachella at 4:59 p.
item.dc:creator: Austin Turner, NewsNation

item.title: Deputies 'probably' prevented 3rd Trump assassination attempt, California sheriff says
item.description: A man was arrested outside of a campaign rally for former President Donald Trump in Southern California, and multiple guns were illegally in his possession, according to authorities.
item.dc:creator: Austin Turner, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Identity of 'badly decomposed' body found in Ohio car wash released: report
item.description: Authorities in Franklin County, Ohio have identified the body of a 53-year-old man who they found “badly decomposed" inside an abandoned car wash.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Not exactly smooth sailing at the 52nd Albuquerque balloon fiesta after 4 incidents
item.description: ALBUQUERQUE, N.M. (AP) — A drone show and a flawless mass ascension ended Sunday’s last day of the 52nd Albuquerque International Balloon Fiesta. But it wasn’t all smooth sailing for this year’s hot air balloon event.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Euthanasia, pronouns, sports betting: Intriguing 2024 ballot measures
item.description: Several states have placed important measures on their ballots, ranging from flag designs to end-of-life care.
item.dc:creator: Damita Menezes, KRON4

item.title: Days left to claim cash in Oracle settlement that 'hundreds of millions' qualify for
item.description: The deadline is fast approaching for people to request a piece of the $115 million settlement fund Oracle agreed to pay out, settling claims it violated many people's privacy by selling their information to third parties.
item.dc:creator: Alix Martichoux, KRON4

item.title: North Carolina football player dies from rare lung cancer at 23
item.description: UNC had honored Tylee Craft, 23, during Saturday's game. Coach Mack Brown, however, said he hadn't learned of Craft's death until after the game.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Professor leaves university after 'highly inappropriate' remarks during lecture
item.description: A University of Kansas professor has left the university after a video went viral on X showing the professor making unnerving remarks
item.dc:creator: Alyssa Mueller, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Iowa mom's boyfriend nearly got away with murder — until a zipper changed everything
item.description: Dr. Michael Baden recounts how a nondescript zipper imprint helped prosecutors put Ivan "Sam" Brammer behind bars in the death of his girlfriend, Ilene Gowan, in a new Fox Nation show.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Florida neighbors band together to recover after one-two punch from hurricanes Helene and Milton
item.description: The devastation of Hurricanes Helene and Milton is still being tallied as a swath of Florida comes to terms with damage from the unusual dual strike of storms in just two weeks.
item.dc:creator: Russ Bynum, Brendan Farrington And Ty Oneil, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Floridians cleaning up from Hurricane Milton are hampered by a widespread fuel shortage
item.description: CORTEZ, Fla. (AP) — Floridians recovering from Hurricane Milton, many of whom were journeying home after fleeing hundreds of miles to escape the storm, spent much of Saturday searching for gas as a fuel shortage gripped the state. In St.
item.dc:creator: RUSS BYNUM, BRENDAN FARRINGTON and TY ONEIL, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: South Bend, Ind. Police Dept. faces federal discrimination suit
item.description: Government says South Bend uses a written test the discriminates against Black applicants and a physical fitness test that discriminates against female applicants.
item.dc:creator: Rich Johnson, NewsNation

item.title: Raleigh man arrested in connection to 1998 sexual assault cold case: Police
item.description: Raleigh police said a man has been arrested in connection to a sexual assault that occurred over 25 years ago.
item.dc:creator: Glyniss Wiggins, NewsNation

item.title: Catholic League accuses Whitmer of mocking Eucharist with Dorito
item.description: Podcaster Liz Plank posted a video on her Instagram showing herself being fed a Dorito by Whitmer, who's standing above Plank.
item.dc:creator: Caroline Vakil, NewsNation

item.title: Officers seize 20 pounds of magic mushrooms in 30 days at Canadian border
item.description: U.S. Customs and Border Protection at the Port of Buffalo seized over 20 pounds of magic mushrooms in 30 days. But some New York legislators have been working to decriminalize the psilocybin since 2020.
item.dc:creator: Johan Sheridan, NewsNation

item.title: Trump hears at a Latino campaign event from someone who lived in the US illegally
item.description: Minutes after Donald Trump delivered his standard warnings about drug dealers and criminals illegally crossing the border during a Saturday campaign event, the former president heard from someone who was once in the country illegally but now plans to vote for him.
item.dc:creator: THOMAS BEAUMONT and NICHOLAS RICCARDI, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Matt McCarty takes lead at Black Desert in his 2nd PGA Tour start
item.description: Matt McCarty took a two-stroke lead into the final round in his second PGA Tour start, shooting a 7-under 64 on Saturday in the inaugural Black Desert Championship.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Actress Jessica Chastain slams airline over $15 credit
item.description: The actress was unhappy after the seatback screen didn't work on her recent Jet Blue flight. So, she took to X, formerly Twitter, to express her dismay.
item.dc:creator: Christine Samra, NewsNation

item.title: FAA investigating Mesa Airlines flight from Austin to Houston
item.description: Mesa Airlines Flight 6078 left from Austin-Bergstrom International Airport on Wednesday, the FAA said.
item.dc:creator: Taylor Girtman, NewsNation

item.title: Whooping cough cases surge to record levels in US, CDC says
item.description: (The Hill) -- Whooping cough cases have increased to record levels since 2014, with four times as many cases compared to last year, data from the CDC showed. There have been more than 16,000 cases this year alone and two confirmed deaths, statistics revealed.
item.dc:creator: Juliann Ventura, ABC 4

item.title: Which states have the highest and lowest voter turnout in presidential elections?
item.description: The rate of voter turnout for the 2020 presidential election was around 67%. But some states were really bringing up that average.
item.dc:creator: Michael Bartiromo, ABC 4

item.title: Harris outpaces Trump in battleground Pennsylvania, but trails in Arizona: Poll
item.description: The New York Times/Philadelphia Inquirer/Siena College survey, released Saturday, shows Harris leading Trump 50 percent to 47 percent among likely voters in the Keystone State.
item.dc:creator: Juliann Ventura, Fox 5

item.title: Who is not allowed to vote in the 2024 presidential election?
item.description: The United States is just weeks away from a highly-anticipated presidential election, but not everyone will be able to exercise their right to vote on Nov. 5.
item.dc:creator: Jeremy Tanner, Fox 5

item.title: Over 9 million pounds of ready-to-eat meat, poultry recalled: USDA
item.description: The products may be contaminated with Listeria monocytogenes, according to the U.S. Department of Agriculture.
item.dc:creator: Michael Reiner, KTLA 5

item.title: Florida deputies help pregnant woman in labor during Milton
item.description: Polk County Sheriff Grady Judd said that some of the office's deputies helped transport a pregnant woman who was going into labor to the hospital early Thursday morning, as Hurricane Milton brought widespread power outages, high winds and flooding to Central Florida.
item.dc:creator: Juliann Ventura, KRON4
